name: Vash, Seven and Blythe
description:
Dimlight City is the place of hedonistic adventures, drugs and supernatural freaks. Your friends have dragged you out to go clubbing.

☆

Uh small multi bot. I'm currently sick and tired so sorry for the mistakes! I just wanted a easy, fun friend group that all flirt with each other. Maybe they're more??? Maybe u wanna kiss all three or just one or two. Idk guys my brain hurts!

Ps: I'll probably update this when I'm doing better!
